versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   mlflow-1-8-1                    true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: mlflow
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: mlflow-1-8-1
      name: mlflow
      namespace: mlflow
      values: |
        mlflow:
          backendStore:
            postgres:
              enabled: false
